trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: capture MVP-009 / SC-001 framework seed SQL as a first-class D1 migration + keep it in sync with tests.
scope: Generate the capstone-framework seed SQL into migrations/0003_framework_seed_data.sql so D1 seed data can be applied via normal migrations, and add a guardrail test to prevent drift between the seed generator and the committed migration file.
changes: Added migrations/0003_framework_seed_data.sql containing idempotent INSERT statements for requirements, deadlines, requirement_sections, credit owners, evidence prompts, dashboard signals, review gates, and quality checks generated from data/capstone-framework.json.
Added tests/framework-seed-migration.test.mjs to assert migrations/0003_framework_seed_data.sql exactly matches scripts/framework-seed.mjs output (normalized for newlines/BOM).
Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md and docs/automation-backlog.md to reference the new seed-data migration and the sync test.
Updated docs/automation-memory.md and docs/progress/run-log.md with the new MVP-009 seed-data evidence.
known_limits: Cloudflare Pages deploys do not auto-apply D1 migrations; a follow-on pass still needs Wrangler to apply migrations (including 0002 + 0003) to local/remote D1 and verify row counts by query.
Alpha fixtures still reference the alpha-only placeholder requirement (req-alpha-proposal) until a follow-on pass switches fixtures/endpoints to seeded requirement IDs.
next_actions: Apply migrations locally: npm run db:migrate:local (or npx wrangler d1 migrations apply senior-capstone-db --local).
Apply migrations remotely: npm run db:migrate:remote (or npx wrangler d1 migrations apply senior-capstone-db --remote).
Verify seeded counts by query (requirements, deadlines, quality_checks, requirement_sections).
Replace alpha-only placeholder requirement fixtures with seeded framework requirement IDs (e.g. req-proposal-draft) in the test-account seed and workflow endpoints.
